strategy: Hit with Storm or Death — he takes +30% from both — and avoid his 40% Myth resist.
If you get marked, cast a charm (any blade counts) within two rounds or he drops a free 0-pip Orthrus on you.
Since you are blading every round anyway, the mark never fires — just keep laying charms while you build up.
Stack blades and finish with one boosted Storm or Death hit; at 4,225 health it does not take much.
cheatNotes: Being marked means you must cast a charm within two rounds or take a free Orthrus. A single blade satisfies it, so keep laying blades and it never triggers.
